auth.onlyEmailPassword: We only need your email and password.
auth.sendLinkDesc: We'll send you a link by email.
auth.passwordHint: At least 10 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number and symbol.
auth.alreadyAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.accountCreated: Account created. Check your email to confirm.
auth.resetEmailSent: If the email exists, you'll receive instructions to reset your password.

profile.title: Profile
profile.whatsappDesc: Pressing «Share» on the forecast will open this contact directly with the message ready to send. Number in international format without spaces or + (e.g. 34612345678).
profile.passwordHint: At least 10 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number and symbol.
profile.deleteWarning: This will permanently delete all your data: sessions, materials and images. Full deletion may take up to 30 days.
profile.deleteCheckbox: I understand this action is irreversible and I will lose all my data.
profile.callmebotHint: Send «I allow callmebot to send me messages» to +34 644 91 96 80 on WhatsApp to get your API Key.

materials.title: Materials
materials.description: Customise each slot name (Sails, Boards...) and add your equipment. They'll appear as a dropdown when logging a session.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.noSessions: You haven't logged any sessions yet.
sessions.timeError: End time must be after start time
sessions.dataDiscarded: Weather data discarded: press «Load data» to update.
sessions.noDataForRange: No data for that time range
sessions.noDataForDate: No weather data for that date

settings.title: ⚙️ Settings
settings.windThresholdDesc: Rows with wind ≥ this value will be highlighted with progressive colours (yellow → red).
settings.hourRangeDesc: Filter the hours shown in the forecast table.
settings.emailNotifDesc: Set up to 2 daily automatic send times with your preferred range.
settings.emailNote: Automatic sending requires the app to be open in the browser at the configured time. Your email client will open with the report ready.
settings.whatsappAlertDesc: Get a wind forecast on WhatsApp when it exceeds the configured threshold. Requires CallMeBot activation (free).
settings.callmebotActivation: Activation (once): send «I allow callmebot to send me messages» to +34 644 91 96 80 on WhatsApp and you will receive your API Key.
settings.whatsappAlertNote: Your phone number is set in your profile. Wind threshold is shared with the email alert.

cookies.title: Privacy & cookies
cookies.desc: We use essential technical cookies for the app to work (session, preferences). With your permission, we also use them for analytics (service improvement) and advertising (Google AdSense).

help.title: User guide
help.subtitle: Everything you need to know to get the most out of WindFlowRadar.

steps.heading: Select a point on the map
steps.body: Tap anywhere on the map or use the location search to centre the view. The side panel will show the weather data for that point.

steps.heading: Read the wind
steps.body: Speed is shown in knots (kt) by default. The direction indicator shows where the wind is blowing from. The value in brackets is the maximum gust.

steps.heading: Wave data
steps.body: Wave height (Hs) and period (T) are updated hourly using the Open-Meteo Marine model. They are indicative: always check real conditions on site.

steps.heading: Temperature and other layers
steps.body: Use the layer selector to switch between air temperature, water temperature and visibility. The 7-day chart shows the hourly trend for the active parameter.

steps.heading: Save a spot
steps.body: With any point selected on the map, press the star button (☆) in the side panel. You can give it a custom name before saving.

steps.heading: Access your spots
steps.body: The favourites dropdown (star icon in the top bar) lists all your saved spots. Press one to centre on it and load its forecast instantly.

steps.heading: Delete a spot
steps.body: Open the favourites dropdown and press the bin icon next to the spot you want to remove. The action is immediate.

steps.heading: Log a session
steps.body: Go to Sessions from the user menu. Press "+ New session" and enter the date, time on the water, the spot, equipment used and your notes. Weather data at that moment is captured automatically.

steps.heading: Link with Strava
steps.body: In the session form you can paste the URL of your Strava activity. It will appear as a link in the session detail.

steps.heading: History and stats
steps.body: The session list shows a chronological summary. Cards include weather conditions at the time, equipment used and total time on the water.

steps.heading: Add equipment
steps.body: Go to Materials from the user menu (/materials). Press "+ Add" and type the item name (board, sail, wing, harness…). You can edit the name directly from the card.

steps.heading: Upload a photo
steps.body: Each equipment card has an image area. Press it or the camera button to upload a photo from your device. The image is stored privately in the cloud: only you can see it.

steps.heading: Use equipment in a session
steps.body: When logging a session, the "Equipment" field shows your saved list. Select what you used and it will be linked to that session.

steps.heading: View enlarged photo
steps.body: Press on any equipment thumbnail to open the image in a full-screen pop-up viewer.

steps.heading: Alias and preferences
steps.body: From your Profile you can change the alias shown in the app and configure preferred units (knots, km/h, m/s) and date format.

steps.heading: Security
steps.body: To change your password use the "Change password" link in the profile. Instructions will be sent to your registered email address.

steps.heading: Delete account
steps.body: In account settings you will find the option to delete your account. This will permanently erase all your data (sessions, materials and images) within a maximum of 30 days.
